title: Savory Sweet Slovakian Mushroom Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Slovakian dish featuring mushrooms, celery salt, and beurre-monte, perfect for a date night dinner
instructions: Heat the beurre-monte in a large skillet over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown
Add the celery salt, thyme, and rice to the skillet, stirring to combine
Add the vegetable broth to the skillet, bringing the mixture to a boil
Reduce the heat to low, cover the skillet, and simmer for 20 minutes
Remove the skillet from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot
